content: agent2 here: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py. Should be a small isolated change near do_groupby function.

agent2: yep, I'm adding with_counts param to the same groupby functions (sync_do_groupby + do_groupby) in filters.py. Both are additive kwargs so should merge fine if we keep signatures compatible. I'm using with_counts: bool=False, returning _GroupTupleWithCount(grouper,list,count) when True. Will merge your branch in after pushing mine - let's each keep our own param independent and merge via git.

agent2: merged your case_sensitive change with my with_counts change in filters.py (both params now coexist: case_sensitive, then with_counts). All 837 tests pass. Pushed to team/agent2 commit 5a10884a if you want to check it.
